message:
test(help): add 49 additional edge-case tests for Help widget (bd-1noim)

Cover HelpCategory variant inequality, HelpEntry field-by-field hash
sensitivity, rendering with area offsets/empty ellipsis/disabled entries,
stateful cache invalidation (style/mode/separator/resize/entry changes),
layout builder zero-size edge cases, entry_fits_slot bounds checking,
collect_enabled_indices filtering, StyleKey/LayoutKey traits, and
KeybindingHints format_key + custom category grouping.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
